manifest.name: Travel Booking Showcase Service Blueprint
manifest.readme:
# Travel Booking Showcase

Generated example ANIP package from Studio-style source docs.

intent.summary: Search available flights by origin and destination and return priced quote references.
Check seat availability and current price for a specific flight.
Book a confirmed flight reservation from a current quote.
Cancel an existing booking within the transactional cancellation window.

capability_formalizations.title: Search flights
capability_formalizations.summary: Search available flights by origin and destination and return priced quote references.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for origin when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for destination when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Check availability
capability_formalizations.summary: Check seat availability and current price for a specific flight.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for flight_number when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Book flight
capability_formalizations.summary: Book a confirmed flight reservation from a current quote.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for flight_number when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for quote_id when it is missing or ambiguous.
Ask for passengers when it is missing or ambiguous.

capability_formalizations.title: Cancel booking
capability_formalizations.summary: Cancel an existing booking within the transactional cancellation window.

implementation_fit.rationale: The generated ANIP substrate exposes the contract; the legacy showcase app remains useful implementation material.

inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for booking_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

permission_intent_bindings.governed_outcome: Allow tutorial users to invoke declared capabilities within the scopes shown by each capability.
permission_intent_bindings.formalization_strategy: Generated examples keep policy simple and visible for onboarding.

runtime_policy_bindings.business_rule: Use the declared capability scope and required inputs as the tutorial boundary.
runtime_policy_bindings.enforcement_notes: Generated examples use simple policy so the contract remains readable.

capability_mappings.title: Search flights
capability_mappings.intent: Search available flights by origin and destination and return priced quote references.

capability_mappings.title: Check availability
capability_mappings.intent: Check seat availability and current price for a specific flight.

capability_mappings.title: Book flight
capability_mappings.intent: Book a confirmed flight reservation from a current quote.

capability_mappings.title: Cancel booking
capability_mappings.intent: Cancel an existing booking within the transactional cancellation window.
